memoryArtifacts.headline: Étienne de Blois, Comte de Blois, and Adela of England in the Foundation for Medieval Genealogy

Étienne de Blois, Comte de Blois, and Adela of England in the Foundation for Medieval Genealogy

zh.Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France: 法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦
zh.Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Fra: 法國布格薩o-吉洛易馬尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Blois於1075年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux30歲，母親Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois13歲。她於1087年之前與Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England在威爾士結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1187年在法國阿奎泰享年113歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Blois于1075年出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux30岁，母亲Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois13岁。她于1087年之前与Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England在威尔士结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1187年在法国阿奎泰享年113岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Blois was born in 1075, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, was 30 and her mother, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, was 13. She married Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England before 1087, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1187, in Aquitaine, France, at the age of 113.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Blois est née en 1075, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England avant 1087, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1187, à Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 113 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Blois 1075 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux 30 und ihre Mutter Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois 13. Sie hat vor 1087 in Wales Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1187 im Alter von 113 Jahren in Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Blois è nata il nel 1075 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, sua padre, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England prima del 1087, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1187, nel Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 113 anni.

ja.Winchester, Hampshire, England: イギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスター

ja.Marcigny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Fra: フランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアーマルシグニー
ja.Aquitaine, France: フランスアクイティアイン
ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Bloisが1075年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meauxは30歳，母Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Bloisは13歳であった。1087年以前にウェールズでHerbert of Winchester Chamberlain of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1187年にフランスアクイティアインで113歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Blois(이)가 1075년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1087년 이전 웨일스에서 Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1187년 프랑스 아키테인에서 113세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Blois nasceu em 1075, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England antes 1087, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1187, em Aquitaine, França, com 113 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Blois родилась в 1075 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England перед 1087 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1187 г. в местности аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 113 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Blois nació en 1075, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Herbert of Winchester Chamberlain of England antes de 1087, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1187, en Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 113 años.
